title: Step-Wise Reinforcement Learning (SWiRL)

defines.name: Step-Wise Reinforcement Learning (SWiRL)
defines.definition: An offline multi-step optimization method that generates synthetic multi-step reasoning and tool-use trajectories, decomposes them into sub-trajectories, and applies step-wise RL optimization.

problem: Traditional RL methods for language models optimize single-step decisions and do not adequately address multi-step reasoning and tool-use tasks.
